accurate.why: Claims about bill provisions appear consistent with the bill text excerpt and the known content of this appropriations bill.

no_hallucinations.why: The specific policy riders mentioned (gender-affirming care ban, abortion restrictions, DEI prohibition, CRT, COVID mandates) are consistent with known provisions of this bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as FY2025 appropriations for military construction, VA, and related agencies.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Appropriations bills set spending levels rather than making permanent law changes.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes key conditions like notification requirements, caps on planning/design funds, and major policy riders.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2025 coverage, construction funds available through September 30, 2029, and VA medical accounts available October 1, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major titles (I, II, III, IV) and key appropriations categories with notable conditions.

objective_tone.why: Uses a markdown header format and bullet structure appropriate for reference but includes detailed policy rider descriptions; however the substance is factual without editorializing.

concise.why: Very long and detailed, covering granular provisions that go well beyond a high-level summary.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names VA, DOD, and related agencies.

correct_figures.why: Correctly identifies FY2025 and September 30, 2029 availability dates for construction funds, consistent with the bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
